/pe/intel/compilers_and_libraries_2020.4.304/linux/bin/intel64/ifort -O3 -O2 -fp-model precise -i4 -r8 CMakeFiles/tave.x.dir/tave.f.o -o tave.x  /apps/ops/prod/libs/intel/19.1.3.304/w3emc/2.9.1/lib64/libw3emc_d.a /apps/ops/prod/libs/intel/19.1.3.304/g2/3.4.5/lib64/libg2_d.a /apps/ops/prod/libs/intel/19.1.3.304/bacio/2.4.1/lib/libbacio_4.a /apps/spack/libpng/1.6.37/intel/19.1.3.304/4ohkronuhlyherusoszzrmur5ewvlwzh/lib/libpng.so /apps/spack/zlib/1.2.11/intel/19.1.3.304/hjotqkckeoyt6j6tibalwzrlfljcjtdh/lib/libz.so /apps/spack/jasper/2.0.25/intel/19.1.3.304/sjib74krrorkyczqpqah4tvewmlnqdx4/lib64/libjasper.so /apps/spack/libjpeg/9c/intel/19.1.3.304/jkr3isi257ktoouprwaxcn4twtye747z/lib/libjpeg.so -lirng -ldecimal -lcilkrts -lstdc++
